name: Living Storybook
landing_text: This journal writes itself. As you explore $(thing)Aetheria$(), face its dangers, and forge alliances, new pages will appear here — a living record of your journey.$(br2)Blank pages mean stories yet to be lived. Return often; the book remembers what you might forget.$(br2)$(italic)Your story begins with Act 1: Arrival.$()
subtitle: Your Journey Through Aetheria
